category_sources: source_facts.description says OpenBSD and Darwin versions of pgrep, pkill, and pfind; official homepage says proctools are text-based utilities to scan for and signal processes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is proctools; official homepage title is Proctools.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge-hosted homepage is the best documentation surface and links online manuals; official pgrep manual page is hosted on the project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage points to SourceForge for downloads and further information, but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pfind, pgrep, and pkill; official homepage describes pgrep, pkill, and pfind for OpenBSD and Darwin.
